---
title: "Resume"
date: "5-8-2024"

about:
  template: trestles
  image: Sections/Resume/Headshot1.png
  image-width: 350px
  image-shape: rounded
  links: 
    - icon: save
    - text: Download
    - href: Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf

format:
  html: 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

![](./Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf){img.style.zoom="115%" fig-align="center" width="9.5in" height="11.7in"}
